DISCOVERY 301,PLAINTIFF HONG ZHENG, AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE TO MACRO ROJO TRUST, AND HONG XIAO'S MOTION TO DEEM ADMITTED AND FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. THE COURT ORDERS ST. FRANCIS HOMES ASSOCIATION TO PAY $3,905 TO PLAINTIFFS WITHIN 30 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/CVA)

Hong Zheng And Hong Xiao Motion To Deem Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF HONG ZHENG, AS AN INDIVIDUAL AND AS TRUSTEE TO MACRO ROJO TRUST, AND HONG XIAO's Motion To Deem Admitted And For Sanctions.

The motion is granted in part and denied in part.

Plaintiffs Hong Zheng and Hong Xiao acknowledge that they received substantially compliant responses before the date of the hearing and they no longer seek a deemed admitted order. Sanctions are nonetheless warranted. (See Code Civ. Proc., section 2033.280, subd. (c) ["It is mandatory that the court impose a monetary sanction under Chapter 7 (commencing with Section 2023.010) on the party or attorney, or both, whose failure to serve a timely response to requests for admission necessitated this motion."].) The court orders St. Francis Homes Association to pay $3,905 to plaintiffs within 30 days of entry of this order.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)
